modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Calls are being forwarded to the wrong number on my VOIP phone.

full_description_text: I was trying to forward my calls on my Cisco VOIP phone, but now they are going to a different number. I don’t know why this is happening, and it’s really confusing. I just want my calls to go to the right place.
short_description: Calls are being forwarded to the wrong number on my VOIP phone.
description: I was trying to forward my calls on my Cisco VOIP phone, but now they are going to a different number. I don’t know why this is happening, and it’s really confusing. I just want my calls to go to the right place.
